articles.title: Santos and Paintsil score first-half goals in 3rd straight 1-1 draw between Dynamo and Galaxy
articles.description: Houston's Guilherme Santos matched a first-half goal by Los Angeles' Joseph Paintsil and the Dynamo and Galaxy played to a 1-1 draw on Saturday night. Paintsil staked the Galaxy to a 1-0 lead with an unassisted score in the 30th minute and Santos answered in the 41st with assists from Jack McGlynn — his fourth — and defender Antônio Carlos — his first. Santos has eight goals in his first 14 appearances in the league.

articles.title: 📜 With doubts in midfield, Galo unveil squad list
articles.description: This Sunday (24), Atlético-MG faces Corinthians at Neo Química Arena, at 6:30 p.m. (Brasília time), in the 17th round of the 2026 Brasileirão. Head coach Eduardo Domínguez has already announced the squad list for the match in Itaquera. Riding a run of two straight wins, Galo could make changes in midfield. After all, Alan Franco could return to the starting lineup after missing the Copa Sudamericana match, taking Alexsander’s spot. Victor Hugo, who came on in the second half against Cienciano after being sidelined for three months due to thigh edema, is another midfielder who could be the new face against Corinthians. Therefore, the probable lineup would be Everson; Natanael, Ruan Tressoldi, Junior Alonso and Renan Lodi; Alan Franco (Alexsander), Maycon and Bernard; Cuello (Victor Hugo), Cassierra and Minda. This article was translated into English by Artificial Intelligence. You can read the original version in 🇧🇷 here.
